name: Chilled Creamed Broccoli Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup milk (skim milk may be used)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the broth, onion, broccoli, thyme, bay leaf, and garlic powder.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat; cover and simmer 10 minutes or until broccoli is tender.
4. Remove bay leaf.
5. Place vegetable mixture in a blender or food processor.
6. Cover and blend for 30 to 60 seconds or until smooth.
7. In the same saucepan, melt butter.
8. Blend in flour, salt, and pepper.
9. Add the milk all at once.
10. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly.
11. Stir in vegetable puree.
12. Cook until heated through for a warm soup.
13. Refrigerate, covered, for several hours for chilled soup.
